title: zoysia matrella subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Zoysia matrella subsp. tenuifolia, also known as Manjishtha or Indian Madder, is a plant species belonging to the Poaceae family, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Zoysia matrella subsp. tenuifolia include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are used to make teas, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
